_comment: DEMO-ONLY testimonials. Rendered by src/components/Testimonials.astro ONLY when BUILD_TARGET=demo-*.

Production builds (BUILD_TARGET=prod-N) NEVER render these. The production path goes through the strict 42 CFR Part 2 schema in src/content/config.ts (consent_date + consent_hash required). These JSON entries deliberately do NOT satisfy that schema — they exist outside the content collection so the production build's zod validation is unaffected.

All three entries below are redacted versions of LOW/MEDIUM-risk legacy testimonials from docs/TESTIMONIAL-REVIEW.md. HIGH-risk entries (Justine W., Chris L.) are explicitly excluded per the review document's recommendations.
Each entry has a 'demo: true' flag and a 'redaction_notes' field so a future compliance review can find and replace these with sourced content + 42 CFR §2.31 consent before any production launch.
Anchored on TESTIMONIAL-REVIEW.md §1 (#3 John O., #5 Matt M., #7 Jerry L.) and §3 (the MODIFY rules — drop staff names, drop program-specific terms like 'IOP', drop patient self-identification).

testimonials.name: John O.
testimonials.quote: Great facility, amazing people, and real-world down-to-earth counselors. I'm grateful for the support I received here.
testimonials.redaction_notes: Dropped 'part of the Agape Services family' framing (§3 MODIFY rule: remove program self-identification). Source: TESTIMONIAL-REVIEW.md §1 #3.

testimonials.name: Matt M.
testimonials.quote: I've been here a couple of times for counseling. The staff are great — very friendly and easy to talk to. I would certainly recommend them to anyone who needs support. Thank you for all that you've done for me.
testimonials.redaction_notes: Fixed typos (acouple → a couple, couseling → counseling, percieve → perceive). Dropped the 'IOP' program reference (§3 MODIFY rule). Dropped the meta-rant about reviews skewing negative. Source: TESTIMONIAL-REVIEW.md §1 #5.

testimonials.name: Jerry L.
testimonials.quote: I like the service — really good counselors, and very helpful.
testimonials.redaction_notes: Light grammar cleanup (§3 MODIFY rule for LOW-risk entries). Source: TESTIMONIAL-REVIEW.md §1 #7.
